goal_text:
You want to book a 'taxi'. The taxi should 'leave after 11:00' and should depart from 'loch fyne'.
The taxi should go to 'bridge guest house'.
Make sure you get 'car type' and 'contact number'.

message: You want to book a taxi. The taxi should leave after 11:00 and should depart from loch fyne
The taxi should go to bridge guest house
Make sure you get car type and contact number
